input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.4.1
            TITLE: the vehicle drawings must meet the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.4.1: The Vehicle Drawings must meet the following:
S.4.4.1 The Vehicle Drawings must meet the following:  
a. Three view line drawings showing the vehicle, from the front, top, and side 
b. Each drawing must appear on a separate page 
c. May be manually or computer generated

final_answer: rule S.4.4.1: The Vehicle Drawings must meet the following: S.4.4.1 The Vehicle Drawings must meet the following: a. Three view line drawings showing the vehicle, from the front, top, and side b. Each drawing must appear on a separate page c. May be manually or computer generated
